name: Tungsten Corporation plc
summary: Tungsten Corporation plc operates an e-invoicing network that also provides trade finance and spend analytics. The company operates through Tungsten Network and Tungsten Network Finance segments. It offers e-invoicing solutions to streamline and digitize accounts payable processes; invoice data capture solutions; purchase order services; and analytics solutions to transform invoice data. The company also provides accounts receivable solutions for suppliers; workflow solutions for streamlining accounts payable processes; and trade finance solutions. In addition, it offers trustee; investment management; and software services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
